signals.raw:

signals.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder Win 2025 NBA Championship | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Oklahoma City Thunder Win 2025 NBA Championship | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Oklahoma City Thunder won the 2025 NBA championship with a 103-91 victory over the Indiana Pacers in Game 7 of the NBA Finals[1]. This is the **first title in the franchise's 17 years in Oklahoma City**[1]. The Thunder's MVP, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, led a dominant third-quarter performance where OKC outscored Indiana 3
